ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary programming language used in the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was created */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the repository has received */,
  "watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers the repository has */,
  "forks_count" INTEGER /* Number of forks the repository has */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the repository */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repository is private */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the repository in KB */,
  "last_push_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last push to the repository */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* Type of license used in the repository */,
  "readme" TEXT /* URL or content of the README file */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repository is archived */,
  "has_wiki" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repository has a wiki */,
  "has_projects" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repository has projects */,
  "has_downloads" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the repository allows downloads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company or organization the owner belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the owner */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio or description of the owner */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Twitter username of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the owner account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the language (for visualization purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_topics" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, maintainer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the repository */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, clone, fork) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access event occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_access_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_contributors" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation, testing) */,
  "contribution_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone associated with the issue */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was closed */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of labels associated with the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES repository_issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pull request (e.g., open, merged, closed) */,
  "base_branch" TEXT /* Base branch to which the pull request is being merged */,
  "head_branch" TEXT /* Head branch from which the pull request is being created */,
  "merged_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the pull request was merged */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the pull request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_pull_requests_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_pull_requests_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pr_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_comments_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES repository_pull_requests ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was created */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Tag name associated with the release */,
  "body" TEXT /* Release notes or body text */,
  "is_prerelease" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the release is a pre-release */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the release is a draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_releases_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
